data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Streamlined interfaces to reduce the time taken to make decisions.
data.technical_spec: Optimizing choices presented to the user.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design focuses on making interactive elements easily accessible.
data.technical_spec: Larger touch targets for frequently used controls.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits chunks of information presented at one time to avoid overload.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design consistency with familiar web interactions to increase user comfort.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Placing key actions at the beginning and end for better retention.
data.technical_spec: Strategic placement of content and CTAs.
